title: DocuSync Configuration
description: Configuration for DocuSync — local-first documentation sync driven by git diffs, embeddings, and LLM rewrites.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL or relative path (e.g. `./docusync.schema.json`) for editor autocomplete and hover tooltips in VS Code.

docs.description: Where documentation lives and how draft files are stored.

roots.description: Directories scanned for markdown documentation to index and update (e.g. `docs`, `wiki`).

draftsDir.description: Folder where new documentation drafts are written when no existing doc matches a significant code change.

ignore.description: Glob patterns excluded from git diff significance checks (defaults often include `**/*.md` so markdown edits do not re-trigger the pipeline).

index.description: Local vector index settings (sqlite-vec + Hugging Face transformers embeddings).

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database storing document chunks and embedding vectors.

embeddingModel.description: Hugging Face model id used for on-device embeddings (default: `Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2`).

chunkMaxTokens.description: Maximum approximate tokens per markdown chunk when splitting docs for indexing.

topK.description: Number of nearest neighbor chunks returned per code change during semantic mapping.

similarityThreshold.description: Cosine similarity cutoff (0–1). Matches above this threshold trigger **update**; below it may create a **draft** if the change is significant.

llm.description: LLM provider used to rewrite or draft markdown (Vercel AI SDK).

provider.description: Cloud or local LLM backend: `openai`, `anthropic`, or `ollama`.

model.description: Model id passed to the provider (e.g. `gpt-4o-mini`, `claude-3-5-haiku-latest`, `llama3.2`).

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for each LLM generation request.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, higher = more creative). Doc updates typically use low values (~0.2).

ollama.description: Settings when `llm.provider` is `ollama` for fully offline inference.

significance.description: Filters which git diffs are large or relevant enough to spend embedding + LLM work on.

minLinesChanged.description: Minimum total added+removed lines across the diff before DocuSync runs the pipeline.

minFilesChanged.description: Minimum number of changed files required to pass the significance filter.

includeGlobs.description: Only consider diffs touching paths matching these globs (e.g. `src/**`).

excludeGlobs.description: Ignore diffs that only touch paths matching these globs (tests, snapshots, etc.).

git.description: Git commit metadata when DocuSync auto-commits documentation in CI.

commitMessage.description: Commit message template for automated doc updates (often includes `[skip ci]`).

authorName.description: Git author name for automated commits.

authorEmail.description: Git author email for automated commits.

github.description: GitHub Actions / pull request notification behavior.

commentOnDraft.description: Post a PR comment linking to new draft docs when `commentOnDraft` is true.

commentOnUpdate.description: Post a PR comment when existing documentation files are updated in-place.

backup.description: When true, write `.bak` copies beside updated markdown files before overwriting.
